warm_up: Review top error from last session: gender.
focus: Verb-second (V2) word order in main clauses: practise building sentences that start with a time or place adverb (e.g. 'Heute möchte ich …', 'Morgen brauche ich …') so that subject–verb inversion becomes automatic.
speaking_prompt: You arrive at your hotel near the Ringstraße after a long flight. Herr Fischer greets you at the front desk. Check in, ask about the WiFi, and confirm your checkout date.
carry_forward_errors: ein kräftiges Brot (was: ein starke Brot) — session 2026-04-20
